result.reason: This issue requires implementing a new multi-user environment, which will involve significant changes to configuration, connection management, security, and UI to support multiple distinct user profiles and their associated settings within the application.
result.approach: Implement a new architecture for user profile management, including separate configuration storage, authentication mechanisms, and UI for user switching and administration. This will impact core application logic, data serialization, and the user interface.
